name: CSV Data Summarizer
description: Automatically analyzes uploaded CSV files and generates comprehensive summary statistics, missing data detection, and quick visualizations using Python, pandas, matplotlib, and seaborn - without requiring user prompts.

findings_summary.notes: Repository confirmed (254 stars, no license, Python, created Oct 2025). SKILL.md (v2.1.0) with clear trigger conditions and automatic behavior. analyze.py is a clean pandas/matplotlib/seaborn script for CSV analysis and visualization. requirements.txt specifies python>=3.8, pandas>=2.0.0, matplotlib>=3.7.0, seaborn>=0.12.0. Examples directory and resources present. ZIP archive (csv-data-summarizer.zip) included for easy distribution. Concern: no open source license declared (GitHub shows None) - users should be aware of usage rights ambiguity. No malicious code found. Code execution required (Python data processing).
